entity.summary: Fantom trading platform combining spot and derivatives markets with an application surface, liquidity, protocol fees, and historical decentralized-exchange volume.
entity.notes: The original Equity application URL currently redirects to the v2 Equity application. DefiLlama identifies Equity as a Fantom trading platform combining spot and derivative markets and reports current TVL plus fee activity. HEI uses hybrid because the product boundary spans spot and derivatives trading surfaces.

evidence.title: Equity trading application
evidence.notes: Current application endpoint redirects to the v2 Equity application, preserving a live product surface.

evidence.title: Equity metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Equity as a Fantom trading platform combining spot and derivative markets and reports current TVL and fee-generation data.

evidence.title: Equity DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Candidate corpus independently identifies Equity in the Fantom exchange and derivatives ecosystem.
